news.headline: March of Dimes pledges $600,000 for research on preeclampsia, aspirin dosing in pregnancy, and vaginal microbiome in preterm birth.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia on February 18, 2025, March of Dimes, a prominent organization dedicated to enhancing the health of mothers and babies, unveiled a significant research funding of $600,000. This vital investment focuses on creating medications to address preeclampsia and establishing the most effective dosage of aspirin for expectant mothers at high risk.

news.headline: Carl's Jr. offers $100,000 in scholarships for 10 inbound college freshmen through 2025 Founders' Scholarship program.
news.summary: Ten new college freshmen are set to be awarded $10,000 individually in scholarships, bringing the total amount to $100,000. The announcement was made by CKE Restaurants, Inc. in Franklin, Tenn., on Feb. 18, 2025. The company has officially launched the application process for the 2025 Carl N. & Margaret Karcher Founders' Scholarship, inviting eligible candidates to apply for this opportunity.

news.headline: Thompson Thrift to build 255-unit luxury multifamily community, Stack at Wheat Ridge, near Denver.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Thompson Thrift revealed plans to develop Stack at Wheat Ridge in the Denver suburb. This project involves the construction of a 255-unit Class A multifamily community. Thompson Thrift is a well-known real estate company and a prominent multifamily developer in the United States.

news.headline: Kasa opens fifth property, The Meridian Miami Beach in Miami Beach on Jan 15, 2025, supporting company's growth efforts.
news.summary: Kasa has recently disclosed the incorporation of its fifth property in the lively Miami Beach market. The Meridian Miami Beach by Kasa commenced operations under Kasa's management on January 15. This development signifies a significant achievement for Kasa as it expands its presence in Miami Beach.

news.headline: BELLA+CANVAS introduces 8 new styles in Heavyweight Collection with fabric weights of 6 oz, 7.5 oz, and 10 oz.
news.summary: In LA on Feb. 18, 2025, BELLA+CANVAS, a top blank apparel brand, unveiled the latest addition to its Heavyweight Collection with eight new styles available in 6 oz, 7.5 oz, and 10 oz fabric options. Aimed at creators, this collection...

news.headline: Cynthia Payne appointed as General Counsel at US-Legal Groups, bringing two decades of experience as a top trial attorney.
news.summary: In Albuquerque, New Mexico, on February 18, 2025, it was announced that Cynthia Payne has been selected as the new General Counsel for New Mexico Legal Group. Payne brings with her almost twenty years of experience in the legal field, having served as a prominent trial attorney and Managing Attorney for the firm. This appointment marks a significant milestone for New Mexico Legal Group as they continue to strengthen their leadership team.

news.headline: BWG Strategy and OTR Global rebrand as BWG Global, a primary research platform for investors and corporations.
news.summary: BWG Strategy, a primary research platform for investors and corporations, has rebranded to BWG Global on Feb. 18, 2025. This change signifies a major milestone for the company.

news.headline: McMiller Games launched Fish Fight at Toy Fair New York with half a billion viral views; a new hit party game.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Los Angeles, the makers of the popular game It's Bananas! unveiled their latest creation, Fish Fight, at the Toy Fair New York. It's Bananas! had amassed 500 million viral views. Fish Fight is a high-energy party game suitable for all age groups.

news.headline: Southland Industries appoints Lauren McLaughlin as VP, General Counsel, overseeing legal, compliance, and risk management. Over 20 years of experience.
news.summary: Southland Industries, based in Dulles, Virginia, has appointed Lauren McLaughlin as their new Vice President, General Counsel. In this role, McLaughlin will oversee all legal matters, compliance, risk management, and corporate governance for the company. McLaughlin brings more than 20 years of experience to the position, having served in key roles such as partner and founding partner at law firms in the Washington, D.C. metropolitan area. This appointment reflects Southland Industries' commitment to strong leadership, with McLaughlin set to play a pivotal role in guiding the company's legal strategies.

news.headline: Rucker Investments buys assets of Pack Labs, an aluminum can co-packer, launching Tailored Bottling Solutions, LLC.
news.summary: Rucker Investments from Beverly, Massachusetts, has recently declared their purchase of specific assets from Pack Labs, Inc., a company specialized in aluminum can co-packing.

news.headline: Dr. Nicole Avena recommends switching from butter to olive oil for better heart health during Heart Health Month.
news.summary: In Baltimore, during Heart Health Month, Dr. Nicole Avena suggests making a simple dietary change for better heart health. Swap butter for olive oil to improve overall well-being.

news.headline: Eight Curator Hotel & Resort Collection properties receive recognition in 2025 Forbes Travel Guide Star Awards in Bethesda, Maryland.
news.summary: Eight properties from the Curator Hotel & Resort Collection were recognized in the 2025 Forbes Travel Guide Star Awards. The awards ceremony, held in Bethesda, Maryland, celebrated the exceptional quality and luxury experiences offered by these properties. This recognition highlights the commitment to excellence and high standards upheld by the eight honored properties within the collection.

news.headline: Energy-supported currencies could help reach higher Kardashev levels. Economic alignment could boost prosperity.
news.summary: Linking monetary rewards with energy generation could be the crucial factor for future success and ample opportunities.

news.headline: Nokian Tyres debuts Surpass AS01 tire for high-performance vehicles in Dayton, Tenn., promising long tread life.
news.summary: Nokian Tyres has introduced the Surpass AS01, an ultra-high-performance tire tailored for high-octane vehicles. This new tire is specifically crafted to provide extended tread life and important benefits for drivers seeking top-tier performance.

news.headline: SIXT USA opens new office in Tulsa, Oklahoma to expand North American operations. Office to be in downtown area, opening in March 2025.
news.summary: SIXT USA, a branch of Sixt SE, a prominent provider of premium mobility services globally, is continuing to grow its presence in North America by launching a new branch in Tulsa, Oklahoma. The office, set to open in March 2025, will be situated at One Technology Center on 175 E 2nd St in downtown Tulsa's central business district. This endeavor is in line with SIXT's worldwide plan to strengthen operations in significant markets.

news.headline: Women are primary financial decision-makers in 69% of households, with 60% of married women leading investments.
news.summary: In a recent report by CFP Board titled "Building Wealth: Insights on Women’s Aspirations & Growing Financial Power," it was revealed that women are playing a crucial role in household finances. The study shows that 69% of women are the primary decision-makers for financial investment choices in their households. Furthermore, among married women surveyed, 60% are leading the investment decisions. This highlights the increasing financial influence of women in households.

news.headline: Latino Community Foundation grants $2.1 million for LA wildfire recovery, including rental aid and mental health support.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the Latino Community Foundation (LCF) has pledged $1 million in grants from its California Wildfire and Disaster Relief Fund to aid families impacted by wildfires in Los Angeles. This additional funding raises the total investment from the Fund to $2.1 million. The grants will cover various needs such as rental assistance, culturally tailored mental health services, and ongoing direct cash aid for vulnerable communities.

news.headline: ID R&D, a part of Mitek Systems, impresses with liveness results in U.S. DHS evaluation of remote identity validation systems.
news.summary: In San Diego, ID R&D, a subsidiary of Mitek Systems, demonstrated outstanding performance in the evaluation conducted by the DHS Science and Technology Directorate for remote identity validation systems.

news.headline: Heritage Environmental Services names James Marlow as CFO on Feb. 18, 2025, joining EQT Infrastructure portfolio.
news.summary: Heritage Environmental Services (HES), a company under EQT Infrastructure, disclosed the appointment of James (Shelby) Marlow as their Chief Financial Officer (CFO) on February 18, 2025. With this recent addition, Marlow will take the financial helm of the organization.

news.headline: ThisWay Global in Austin appoints new sales director to drive growth; expanding leadership team for second time in 2025.
news.summary: A renowned company in the industry has appointed a new Sales Director to spearhead growth acceleration. Established in Austin, Texas, ThisWay Global is a cutting-edge AI software developer, originating from research and development conducted at the University of Cambridge ideaSpace. The company is enhancing its leadership by making a second addition to the team in early 2025...

news.headline: Jackie Geller and Grace Chance appointed Senior VPs at Digital Evidence Group, starting Feb. 24, 2025. #LegalServices
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Digital Evidence Group (DEG) revealed that Jackie Geller and Grace Chance are set to join the company as Senior Vice Presidents starting on February 24, 2025. The additions of Geller and Chance bring valuable expertise to DEG, as they are respected professionals in the legal services sector.

news.headline: Exactech unveiled 15 studies at ORS 2025 on AI, radiomics, and polyethylene tech in joint arthroplasty; leading medical tech.
news.summary: In Gainesville, Florida on February 18, 2025, Exactech, a renowned player in medical technology, unveiled findings from 15 fresh studies showcasing breakthroughs in total joint arthroplasty and trauma solutions at the annual Orthopaedic Research Society (ORS) gathering in Phoenix.

news.headline: Luxury Collection debuts in Macao with Londoner Grand luxury hotel, celebrating East-meets-West heritage. Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: The Luxury Collection is commemorating the unique blend of East-meets-West heritage in Macao by combining cultural traditions with modern luxury. Based in Bethesda, Md., the brand is under Marriott Bonvoy's expansive portfolio of more than 30 exceptional hotel brands. The celebration marks the rich cultural fusion in Macao, highlighting its luxurious modern offerings in a traditional setting. The event took place on February 18, 2025, with numerous significant figures in attendance.

news.headline: HarrisX Ad Index rates NFL's "Somebody" as top Super Bowl 2025 ad. LAY's "The Little Farmer" and Budweiser's "First Delivery" also popular. Corporate responsibility ads stand out, securing six of top eight spots.
news.summary: "The Little Farmer" by LAY has been ranked as the highest performing consumer product advertisement, surpassing Budweiser's "First Delivery." Corporate and social responsibility ads have dominated with six out of the top eight positions. The HarrisX Ad Index rating platform provides self-service technology for testing and benchmarking advertisements.

news.headline: Regulatory compliance veteran Carl Pry joins Asurity Advisors™ as a Senior Advisor, bringing expertise in banking law and corporate finance.
news.summary: A prominent financial advisory firm, Asurity Advisors, LLC, announced on February 18, 2025, the addition of Carl Pry, a highly experienced professional in regulatory compliance, banking law, and corporate finance, as their new Senior Advisor. Carl Pry brings a wealth of experience in these areas to the team. This move is expected to further strengthen Asurity Advisors' expertise in these critical sectors.

news.headline: CropX Technologies appoints Daniele Maggiolini as independent Advisor to the Board, a global leader in digital agriculture.
news.summary: On Feb. 18, 2025, CropX Technologies, a renowned company in digital agricultural solutions, revealed the addition of Daniele Maggiolini to their Board as an independent Advisor. With expertise as the Global Head of Corporate Development for the Agricultural Segment, Daniele brings valuable insights to the team.

news.headline: Sun Life U.S. and DentaQuest are accepting applications for 2025 Health Access Hero awards to honor those promoting health equity.
news.summary: In Wellesley, Massachusetts, on February 18, 2025, the annual Health Access Hero awards application period has officially begun. Companies Sun Life U.S. and DentaQuest, a division of Sun Life focusing on dental services, are honoring entities and persons who are dedicated to promoting health equity within their communities through various initiatives. This recognition program highlights the efforts of those making a positive impact on healthcare access, with nominations being accepted for organizations and individuals who demonstrate a commitment to enhancing health equity. If selected, winners will be acknowledged for their contributions in advancing accessible healthcare services and addressing disparities in health outcomes. The call for nominations underscores the significance of supporting initiatives that strive to improve health equality and accessibility for all.

news.headline: Global semiconductor manufacturing industry records strong Q4 2024 results with solid YoY growth across key segments - SEMI.
news.summary: In Milpitas, California on February 18, 2025, it was reported that the global semiconductor manufacturing sector saw a successful end to 2024, with significant growth in the fourth quarter and throughout the year compared to the previous year. SEMI revealed in its Q4 2024 report that most crucial industry sectors experienced robust year-on-year expansion, pointing towards a positive trend in the market.

news.headline: Global well cementing services market valued at $8.9 billion in 2023, projected to reach $13.4 billion by 2033 with a 4.2% CAGR.
news.summary: Allied Market Research released a report on the "Well Cementing Services Market", detailing a market value of $8.9 billion in 2023. The report forecasts the market to reach $13.4 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.2% from 2024 to 2033. The growth is attributed to the rising complexity of drilling environments, necessitating advanced cementing techniques for zonal isolation and leak prevention. Rig-enabled systems, like SLURRY CHIEF™ Mark III by SLB, offer efficiency and reduced operational risks. The report covers market details from 2024 to 2033, including market size, CAGR, and factors driving growth like nanomaterial incorporation in cement systems for better performance.

news.headline: ArborEXPO™ '25 returns to Springfield, MA for tree care professionals on March 26-28, 2025 at The Big E.
news.summary: A major gathering for tree care experts, ArborEXPO™ '25, will be held at the Eastern States Exposition in Springfield, Massachusetts on March 27-28, 2025. The event will kick off with a Pre-Conference Day on March 26, offering extensive workshops and activities for attendees. This year's event promises to be a valuable experience for professionals in the tree care industry.

news.headline: Seal Shield launches Clean Seal™ Privacy Screen Protectors at HIMSS 2025, improving screen protection.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida on February 18, 2025, Seal Shield, a prominent figure in pioneering healthcare technology solutions, revealed the introduction of its fresh Clean Seal™ Privacy Screen Protectors. The timing of this release aligns perfectly with the upcoming HIMSS 2025 Global Health Conference. This cutting-edge product aims to ensure privacy and protection for screens and is expected to make waves in the industry.

news.headline: Virtual therapy market expected to reach USD 1.62 billion by 2031. Segmented by type and application.报道。
news.summary: The Virtual Therapy Market is divided by type into Non-Immersive and Fully Immersive, and by application into Psychotherapy, Virtual Rehabilitation, PTSD, Occupational Therapy, and Lesion Therapy. On February 18, 2025, in BANGALORE, India, the global market for Virtual Reality Therapy reached a value of USD [Value].

news.headline: Home Chef partners with Ayesha Curry to offer new exclusive recipes. Available online and in stores nationwide.
news.summary: Home Chef, a top meal solutions company available online and in stores across the nation, has introduced new exclusive recipes in their meal kits. These recipes highlight bold flavors and popular dishes directly from Ayesha's kitchen. This partnership aims to enhance customer experience.

news.headline: J.P. Morgan plans to convert $1.3 billion JPMorgan Unconstrained Debt Fund to JPMorgan Flexible Debt ETF.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 18, 2025, J.P. Morgan Asset Management disclosed its intention to convert the JPMorgan Unconstrained Debt Fund into an ETF, subject to approval by the board in May 2025. The modified ETF will be known as the JPMorgan Flexible Debt ETF. The management of the ETF will remain fundamentally unchanged, keeping a similar investment approach...

news.headline: Refrigerants market expected to reach $9.56 billion by 2029 per report by MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, on February 18, 2025, a report on the refrigerants market was released. The report covers various types of refrigerants including HFC & blends, HFO, Isobutane, Propane, Ammonia, and Carbon Dioxide. It also analyzes their applications in refrigeration systems, air conditioning systems, chillers, and MAC. The market analysis includes regions such as Asia Pacific, North America, Europe, and the Middle East & Africa. This extensive report provides insights into the global refrigerants market, showcasing the increasing demand for eco-friendly alternatives and forecasting significant growth in the market.

news.headline: Arcade Collection GO launched by Incredible Technologies, allowing portable arcade gaming experience.
news.summary: In Lincolnshire, Illinois, Incredible Technologies has revolutionized the gaming industry by introducing portable arcade gaming options. The company's latest innovation, the Golden Tee GO, allows gamers to enjoy arcade-style gaming on-the-go. Building on this success, they have now launched the Arcade Collection GO - a multicade featuring a variety of popular games. This advancement eliminates the need for a dedicated space for bulky arcade cabinets, making gaming more accessible. With these portable options, gamers can now enjoy their favorite arcade games wherever and whenever they want.

news.headline: Ncontracts releases 2025 Venminder State of Third-Party Risk Management Survey, providing insights into industry practices and challenges.
news.summary: Ncontracts, a prominent company specializing in compliance, risk, and third-party management solutions for the financial industry, has released the 2025 Venminder State of Third-Party Risk Management Survey. This annual report, now in its ninth edition, provides a detailed analysis of how businesses are handling third-party risk. The survey delves into various aspects such as current strategies, obstacles faced, compliance motivators, and the concrete advantages of effective third-party risk management. This year's survey aims to offer a comprehensive understanding of the landscape, with a focus on industry practices, challenges, and opportunities.

news.headline: Saviynt named to CRN's 2025 Security 100 list for IT security vendors collaborating with channel partners.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based Saviynt, a top provider of cloud-native identity and governance platform solutions, was recently recognized by CRN® by being included in the esteemed Security 100 list. This list showcases prominent IT security vendors dedicated to working with channel partners to safeguard businesses against cyber threats. Saviynt's inclusion in CRN’s 2025 Security 100 list highlights their strong dedication to empowering the industry.

news.headline: Global Perlite and Vermiculite industry report provides insight on market trends, manufacturing, consumption, trade, and price analysis for 2019-2034.
news.summary: Dublin - A new report on the global perlite and vermiculite market has been released, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report provides comprehensive insights into the industry from 2019 to 2034, offering valuable data on a global, regional, and national scale. It includes analysis of the 2019-2024 market trends and forecasts for 2025-2034 regarding supply, demand, prices, and downstream sectors. This report is a must-have for anyone seeking in-depth information on the perlite and vermiculite market worldwide.

news.headline: Precursor launches platform to scale energy and industrial projects, assisting in going from pilot to deployment.
news.summary: A new company called Precursor, based in Los Angeles, New York, and Washington, aims to assist innovative energy and industrial technologies in transitioning from pilot to commercial stages. This firm specializes in facilitating the scaling process for these breakthrough technologies.

news.headline: SentinelOne on CRN's Security 100 List for 8th Year in Endpoint and Managed Security category, highlighting cybersecurity vendors.
news.summary: SentinelOne, a top player in AI-driven security based in Mountain View, California, has secured a spot on CRN's Security 100 list in the Endpoint and Managed Security sector. This marks the eighth year in a row that SentinelOne has earned this recognition. The list, compiled by The Channel Company, highlights key cybersecurity providers dedicated to partnering with channels in safeguarding businesses against cyber threats. SentinelOne is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol S and continues to demonstrate its commitment to collaborative efforts in the channel partner community.

news.headline: Solana's price drops 9.58% in 24 hours to $166.67, down 15% in past week moving from $199.78.
news.summary: In the last 24 hours, the price of Solana's cryptocurrency (SOL) has dropped by 9.58% to $166.67. Over the past week, SOL has experienced a decrease of 15.0%, falling from $199.78 to its current value. The chart illustrates the price fluctuations and volatility of Solana over the 24-hour period.

news.headline: Trump's tariffs pose threat to auto industry in North America, risking production slowdown, say analysts.
news.summary: The imposition of tariffs by President Donald Trump poses a significant threat of disrupting automotive production throughout North America, according to industry insiders and analysts.

news.headline: Vultr introduces AMD Instinct MI325X GPUs in Chicago data center for enterprise AI usage, enhancing performance.
news.summary: Vultr has recently revealed the integration of the AMD Instinct™ MI325X GPUs in the Chicago data center region. This move signifies a significant advancement in their infrastructure, showcasing their commitment to enhancing performance and capability.

news.headline: Italian tennis player Jasmine Paolini becomes Amazfit’s athlete ambassador, ranked World No. 4.
news.summary: Amazfit, based in Milpitas, California, revealed today that they have signed Jasmine Paolini, the talented Italian tennis player ranked World No. 4, as their latest global athlete partner.

news.headline: Corelight reduces SIEM ingest by 80% without compromising security fidelity, enhancing storage cost savings and threat investigations.
news.summary: Corelight, a leading provider of network detection and response (NDR) solutions, revealed on February 18, 2025, in San Francisco, their latest data aggregation feature. This new capability aims to reduce storage costs while also enhancing the speed of threat hunting and forensic investigations. Corelight has seen steady growth, becoming a prominent player in the industry. This innovation will significantly impact operational efficiency and effectiveness, catering to the increasing demand for advanced security measures.

news.headline: Nike and SKIMS collaborate to launch NikeSKIMS, disrupting the fitness and activewear industry. Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: Two renowned companies have come together to revolutionize the worldwide fitness and activewear sector. Nike, Inc. (NYSE: NKE) and SKIMS have collaborated to introduce NikeSKIMS, marking a significant partnership in disrupting the industry. The joint venture aims to combine the strengths of both brands to create innovative offerings catering to fitness enthusiasts. The announcement was made in Beaverton, Ore., and Los Angeles on Feb. 18, 2025. This move is expected to shake up the market and lead to exciting developments in the field of athletic apparel.
